data.reasoning: Both models skipped the PKGBUILD file due to incorrect binary file detection, leaving no basis for safety assessment. Critical build/install logic remains unaudited.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD (core build script) was skipped by both models
No review of install hooks or referenced scripts
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (malicious commands, unsafe downloads, privilege escalations) were missed due to skipped file
learnings: Fix binary file detection: PKGBUILD must always be treated as text
Implement fallback mechanism when core files fail to parse
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install files over other content
Add validation for file reading errors before audit
